_comment: Local model context for c_tools/tui_agent/. Reads full model settings from model-map.json at project root.

models_in_use.local_flow: agent.py receives full file content + user instruction -> streams a complete rewritten version via Anthropic SDK -> written back to disk. project_mode.py ProjectExecutor calls the same model per-file when executing a project-wide plan.
models_in_use.fallback: none -- if Haiku is unavailable the edit step fails and logs to stderr

models_in_use.local_flow: convo.py: daemon thread started alongside Haiku, calls GPT with a tech-slang prompt, drip-feeds generated lines to the TUI log panel via on_message callback. project_mode.py ProjectPlanner: sends file tree outline + instruction, expects {prompt, phrases} JSON response to build the executor's instructions.
models_in_use.fallback: convo.py falls back to randomly sampled phrases from ai/data/phrases.db (category: ai-working) if OpenAI is unavailable
